text: 4. The Subcontractor shall furnish and install all unit kitchen sinks. Kitchen sinks shall be GS-HM-2818S and GS-HM-3118S 18ga Stainless Steel undermount basin for all unit kitchens. The Subcontractor shall drill all kitchen sink faucet and valve holes including air gap holes, sprayer holes, garbage disposal push button and switches holes. The Subcontractor shall also provide an eased-edge, polished, finished sink opening and confirm with the plumbing subcontractor that the drainpipe and garbage disposal connections will fit properly to the sink prior to sink installation. The sink shall be installed with clips as per best industry practices.
